title: Zepto South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Zepto South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zepto South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About Zepto South Asia Partners:
Zepto South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
